package.name: argus_superpoint
package.description: ARGUS learned-feature front-end (standalone). Runs SuperPoint (and optionally SuperPoint+LightGlue) via ONNX Runtime on the RTX 4050, subscribes to /argus/cam0/image_raw, and publishes keypoints on /argus/vio/keypoints (sensor_msgs/PointCloud2) plus an annotated overlay image for RViz. Proves learned features survive the low-texture Zone-B walls where Shi-Tomasi/KLT starve.
